game_name: Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter

danger_signals.visual_form: TIE Fighter, TIE Bomber, and Assault Gunboat models rendered with texture mapping and dynamic lighting
danger_signals.meaning: Active threat requiring evasion or engagement

danger_signals.visual_form: Outnumbered allied craft vs. enemy wing formations displayed in real-time HUD
danger_signals.meaning: Tactical disadvantage; survival depends on skill or reinforcement

danger_signals.visual_form: Visual degradation of ship hull textures, smoke/fire particle effects

safety_signals.visual_form: Y-Wing and X-Wing models rendered alongside player craft
safety_signals.meaning: Tactical support available; reduced isolation risk

safety_signals.visual_form: Capital ship or station silhouettes at mission objective locations
safety_signals.meaning: Resupply, repair, or extraction point nearby

safety_signals.visual_form: Clear 3D space with good visibility in all directions

faction_indicators.color_identity: Red/orange engine glow; lighter hull tones
faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Rebel insignia on X-Wing and Y-Wing fuselage
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Rebel bases, supply vessels, evacuation targets depicted in campaign missions

faction_indicators.color_identity: Blue/green engine glow; dark hull plating
faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Imperial insignia on TIE craft; Star Destroyer silhouettes
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: TIE Fighter (standard), TIE Bomber (bulbous variant), Assault Gunboat (modified craft)
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Star Destroyers, Super Star Destroyers (Vengeance), Interdictor Cruisers, Imperial factories

world_state_to_visual.world_state: Rebel campaign active (Balance of Power expansion)
world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Missions centered on base evacuation, anti-Empire strikes, capital ship captures; Rebel craft compositions dominate available squadrons
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player flies as Rebel pilot; objectives emphasize defensive and offensive operations against Imperial targets

world_state_to_visual.world_state: Imperial campaign active (Balance of Power expansion)
world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Missions mirror Rebel campaign but show Imperial perspective; Super Star Destroyer Vengeance featured prominently; Rebel factory destruction objectives
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player flies as elite Avenger squadron under Admiral Senn; objectives focus on Imperial superiority and Rebel elimination

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Deep space setting with no narrative context; faction composition determined by player squadron selection at mission start
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Free-for-all, team-based, or cooperative modes; all craft information visible to all players in real-time regardless of position

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Both Rebel (X-Wing, Y-Wing, B-Wing) and Imperial (TIE Fighter, TIE Bomber, Assault Gunboat) craft available with equivalent visual complexity via texture mapping
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Balance of Power expansion added B-Wings and other previously missing vessels to create symmetrical gameplay

environmental_storytelling.example: Super Star Destroyer Vengeance rendered at massive scale vs. smaller Rebel transport vessels; visual hierarchy communicates power imbalance and strategic importance
Interdictor Cruiser, Imperial factories, and Rebel bases positioned as distinct environmental targets; their visual prominence signals narrative focus

Balance of Power expansion uses identical mission structure from opposing viewpoints; same events rendered with faction-specific cutscenes and alternate endings show political conflict from both sides
Engine glow colors, hull texture patterns, and light reflection differentiate Rebel and Imperial craft immediately; creates visual dialect without text overlay

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Maintains visual spacing with squadron mates; coordinated targeting indicators visible in HUD
Erratic movement patterns to maximize sensor coverage; appears individually or in loose formations
Slower approach vectors; positioned for bombing run geometry toward capital ship or base target
Bulbous visual profile signals payload capacity; slower than TIE Fighter but heavier weapons indicated by model silhouette
Distinctive angular design communicates advanced weaponry; rotation mechanics affect visual profile during flight
Massive scale; defensive turret fire visible as colored beam effects; destruction triggers mission success/failure state change

notes: Wikipedia source provides minimal detail on visual manifestation mechanics. Extraction based on: (1) explicit references to texture mapping, Gouraud shading, dynamic lighting effects as technical visual systems; (2) craft model differentiation by type (bulbous TIE Bomber, distinctive B-Wing angular design); (3) faction association via craft type (X-Wing/Y-Wing = Rebel, TIE variants = Imperial); (4) campaign narrative structure in Balance of Power showing dual-perspective world state; (5) multiplayer arena design requiring real-time information visibility to all players. Game paradigm (simulation) implies realistic visual feedback for flight state and damage. No explicit documentation of HUD design, minimap faction colors, or detailed environmental cues in source material. Inferences drawn from space combat simulation conventions and Star Wars franchise visual canon.
sources_used: Wikipedia: Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter
